tool.name: GaCDI GEO
tool.description: import supplementary files from NCBI Gene Expression Omnibus

param.name: accessions
param.label: GEO accession(s)
param.help: One or more GSE/GSM accessions, separated by commas, spaces or new lines (e.g. GSE12345, GSM67890). Supplementary files for each accession are downloaded.

validator.message: Enter GSE/GSM accessions separated by commas, spaces or new lines.

tool.help:
**GaCDI — Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO) importer**
Downloads the supplementary files associated with one or more `GEO <https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/>`_ accessions (series ``GSE`` or samples ``GSM``) into your Galaxy history.
Enter accessions separated by commas, spaces or new lines. For each accession the tool enumerates the files under its NCBI ``suppl/`` directory and downloads them. @HELP_FOOTER@
